---
name: Hero Registration
about:
title: "[HERO-REGISTRATION] "
assignees: []
---

Cole abaixo o JSON do seu `hero-template/src/main/resources/manifest.json`.

```json
{
  "heroId": "seu-hero-id",
  "heroName": "SeuNomeHeroi",
  "heroClass": "Backend",
  "skills": ["java", "spring-boot", "sql"],
  "endpoint": "http://localhost:8081",
  "model": "phi3:mini",
  "specialty": "Resolvo problemas de API e dados",
  "level": 1,
  "xp": 0
}
```

Checklist:
- [ ] `heroId` unico
- [ ] `skills` reais e coerentes
- [ ] `endpoint` local preenchido
- [ ] titulo com prefixo `[HERO-REGISTRATION]`
